name: Tamale Pie #2
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Beans of choice, cooked (black, red, kidney, pinto)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beans, corn, green pepper, and olives in a 2- to 3-quart glass casserole.
2. In a small bowl, combine tomato sauce, tomato paste, cumin, chili powder, and oregano. Pour over the bean mixture.
3. In a large glass bowl, combine cornmeal and water. Microwave, uncovered, on high for 6 minutes. Remove from microwave and stir well. Add egg replacer and salt. Stir again.
4. Spread over the bean mixture; cover and microwave on high for 10 minutes. Let cool slightly before serving.
5. Serves 4.
